top_bullish.headline: Britain’s Electric Vehicle Market Is Booming as Fuel Prices Climb
top_bullish.summary: Brits are racing to get their hands on electric vehicles after a surge in oil prices triggered by the war in Iran has driven away demand for petrol and diesel cars, one of the UK’s biggest used car supermarkets has said. top_bearish.headline: U.S. To Build Its First Ever Floating LNG Export Terminal
top_bearish.summary: Over the past couple of years, the United States has established itself as the world's largest exporter of liquefied natural gas (LNG), with an operational liquefaction capacity of ~15.4 billion cubic feet per day (Bcf/d). top_bearish.headline: Rotterdam's Growing Oil Storage Fraud Problem Is Costing Traders Millions
top_bearish.summary: The port of Rotterdam has seen, in recent years, increasingly sophisticated attempts by fraudsters to scam millions of dollars out of traders by paper fraud, offering non-existent oil storage at one of the world’s biggest oil hubs. all_headlines.headline: U.S. jet fuel production rises after prices doubled in March
